---
title: "About ReModel"
image: images/logo_yellow.svg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-strategy-unit
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/The-Strategy-Unit

---

Further context about the ReModel project to go here
